items.question: How much do services cost?
items.answer: The cost depends on the services chosen, the scope of work and the advertising budget. There is no fixed price list — each project is unique. The first consultation is free: we analyse your situation and propose a solution for your specific budget.

items.question: How quickly will I see results?
items.answer: It depends on the tool. Google Ads and Meta Ads deliver first leads within 1–2 weeks of launch. SEO takes 3–6 months for stable organic traffic. Example: a client received 178,975 UAH in revenue in 23 days with an advertising budget of 28,496 UAH.

items.question: How are you different from a freelancer?
items.answer: A freelancer is one person with limited responsibility. We are a team of specialists in each area: advertising, SEO, SMM, development, photo/video. A single strategy, transparent reporting and accountability for results — not just the process.

items.question: Will it work for my specific niche?
items.answer: Yes. Before starting, we audit the niche and analyse competitors. If your audience is online — we'll find a way to reach them. We've worked with e-commerce, healthcare, local services and B2B.

items.question: How does reporting work?
items.answer: Weekly and monthly reports with real numbers: how much was spent, how many leads were received, what the cost per lead was. No 'vanity metrics' — only what affects your profit. You always retain access to advertising accounts.

items.question: Can I order just one service?
items.answer: Yes. We work both comprehensively and individually — just Google Ads or just SEO if that's your request. But if the goal is maximum results, a systematic approach works much more effectively.

items.question: Do I need a large budget to start?
items.answer: No. We select tools for your budget, not the other way around. Even with a small initial budget, you can get real leads — the key is to identify the right channel and set up the campaign correctly.

items.question: What if I'm not satisfied with the results?
items.answer: We don't disappear after launch. If a campaign isn't delivering expected results — we analyse the cause and adjust the approach. Regular optimisation is included in the cost of work, not an additional service.
